SmtpSettings._Note: To enable purchase emails: use a Gmail account with 2FA enabled, create an App Password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords, then fill in SenderEmail and SenderPassword in your appsettings.Development.json (not here, to keep credentials out of git)

Stripe._Note: Test-mode keys only. Set Stripe:SecretKey, Stripe:PublishableKey and Stripe:WebhookSecret via 'dotnet user-secrets' or appsettings.Development.json - NEVER commit real keys here. Get test keys at https://dashboard.stripe.com/test/apikeys
